visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A large killer whale (orca) leaps from a stadium pool, creating a massive wave that crashes over audience members sitting in the front rows. The crowd is densely packed and wearing light blue plastic rain ponchos. (2) The scene shifts indoors to an aquarium gallery where a man in a beige t-shirt, black cap, and shorts stands in front of a large tank. Two white beluga whales swim gracefully behind the glass, and the man waves his hand as if greeting them. (3) The video cuts back to the outdoor stadium show. Repeated shots show the orca intentionally tail-splashing the audience, soaking everyone in the blast zone. Close-ups capture people's faces—a young boy screaming in delight, a woman laughing while trying to shield her phone. (4) A final sequence features a man in a blue poncho, completely drenched, standing up and laughing at the camera while the orca swims peacefully in the background tank. The lighting transitions from natural outdoor daylight to bright artificial gallery light.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV：實際上的海生館. (2) [Subtitle]: POV：我以為的海生館. (3) [Subtitle]: POV：實際上的海生館. [Logo]: KAMOGAWA SEA WORLD.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: A large audience of over 20 people in a stadium, one main man in the gallery, and several close-up individuals in the crowd.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One man wearing a beige shirt, black cap, and shorts; another man wearing a blue plastic raincoat over casual clothes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor marine stadium with a large blue water pool and tiered seating under a white canopy; an indoor aquarium with large floor-to-ceiling glass tanks.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A heavy, broadband splashing sound echoes as water hits the stadium seats, followed immediately by a wave of high-pitched female and child screams. A bright Japanese pop track with a synth-heavy melody and female vocals begins to play. (2) The ambient noise drops as the female vocals in the song become clearer and the melody turns more lyrical and gentle. No speech is heard. (3) Intense splashing sounds return, drowning out the music temporarily. Rapid-fire laughter and loud, high-arousal shouting from multiple voices create a chaotic but joyful atmosphere. (4) A male voice speaks in a high-arousal, excited tone, laughing between phrases. The sound of water dripping and distant crowd chatter forms a low-intensity ambient background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses the 'Expectation vs. Reality' trope to humorously highlight the chaotic and wet experience of a killer whale show compared to the peaceful image of an aquarium visit.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes sound to emphasize the contrast between scenes, with splashing noises serving as the primary 'reality' anchor.
